title: The House GOP is forging ahead with a SAVE Act plan. It may be doomed.
shortDescription: Vice President JD Vance has embraced the House GOP's plan to pass SAVE America. One Republican, however, is calling the effort a "waste of time."

title: Trump approval stuck at 37% in new poll
shortDescription: Trump's approval remains stuck in the 30s as a new poll shows growing voter frustration with the economy and the Iran conflict.

title: Trump election speech faces skepticism; networks reject live coverage: Updates
shortDescription: President Trump will talk about election security and Iran in a primetime address to the nation Thursday evening.

title: Trump's attorney general pick to meet with Epstein accusers, DOJ says
shortDescription: Acting Attorney General Todd Blanche will meet with Jeffrey Epstein accusers, hours after his AG nomination was threatened over the issue, the DOJ says.

title: Ossoff slams Trump over 'sore loser' speech
shortDescription: Sen. Jon Ossoff criticized President Trump's upcoming speech on the 2020 election, calling him "the world's most famous sore loser."

title: WH employee accused of betting on Trump speeches
shortDescription: A White House teleprompter operator was accused of making money betting on President Trump's speeches was placed on unpaid administrative leave.

title: White House employee on leave for betting on Trump speeches
shortDescription: Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt confirmed that federal regulators are looking into a White House worker who bet on President Donald Trump's speeches.

title: 5 things to watch for in Trump's primetime address on elections
shortDescription: President Trump is set to address "election integrity" in a primetime address July 16. Here are five things to watch for.

title: White House defends ICE vehicle stops
shortDescription: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said ICE vehicle stops will continue as officials address recent deaths.

title: White House says CDC cuts didn't impact outbreak response
shortDescription: White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt said the CDC and FDA "have the resources they need" to combat an outbreak of a diarrhea-causing parasite.

title: Vance: Trump administration 'absolutely screwed up' Epstein files release
shortDescription: JD Vance told Joe Rogan that the Trump administration "screwed up" its handling of the Epstein files, acknowledging the rollout fueled mistrust.

title: Who is Roger Rogoff? Trump fires US attorney an hour into Seattle job
shortDescription: Roger Rogoff came to the helm of the U.S. attorney's office in Seattle on Wednesday. After 54 minutes and an email, his time in the position was over.

title: Permanent daylight saving has precedent. See Congress's past efforts
shortDescription: Congress is one step closer to making daylight saving time permanent. But it's not the first time this has happened.

title: Trump continues to claim 2020 election fraud. He lost over 60 court cases
shortDescription: President Trump is addressing the nation tonight and expected to talk about election security. He still challenges the 2020 results, despite legal losses.

title: Paxton, Talarico to debate ahead of the Texas Senate November election
shortDescription: James Talarico challenged Ken Paxton to three debates as the candidates remain tied in the Texas Senate race. Here's what we know.

title: Kai Trump says politics is 'not my thing'
shortDescription: Kai Trump, the president's granddaughter, has tried to stay out of politics in the past, while focusing on her golf career.

title: Treasury producing $1 gold Trump coin
shortDescription: The U.S. Treasury is producing a $1 gold Trump coin with President Donald Trump’s face on the front to be released in the fall.

title: Ossoff brings Georgia elections to Clayton's Senate nomination hearing
shortDescription: GA Sen. Jon Ossoff questioned Jay Clayton, nominee for director of national intelligence, during a Senate nomination hearing and asked about elections.

title: Trump attorney general pick in jeopardy over Epstein accusers' access
shortDescription: A key Republican said he wouldn't vote to confirm Todd Blanche until he meets with Jeffrey Epstein's accusers.

title: Senators Warnock, Ossoff speak on 2020 elections ahead of Trump speech
shortDescription: Georgia Senators Warnock and Ossoff had made numerous statements about accusations of fraud in the 2020 elections in Georgia.

title: If Blanche is confirmed as AG, it will be by a razor thin GOP majority | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Senators grill Todd Blanche on Trump’s legally-defunct IRS settlement, the Epstein files and the “weaponization” of the DOJ.

title: At confirmation hearing for Trump nominee, talk of Jeffrey Epstein sparks tears
shortDescription: The DOJ has faced intense scrutiny for not releasing enough documents from the Epstein files and not redacting enough women's names and photographs.

title: How to watch Trump's address to the nation live
shortDescription: Trump said the address would be similar to recent speeches he gave at Mount Rushmore on July 3 and the National Mall on July 4. Here's how to watch.
